name: PII Discovery and Classification
description: Automated PII discovery and classification workflow triggered by DLP scanning alerts. Riggs AI analyzes discovered data to classify PII types (SSN, credit card, health records, etc.), assess exposure risk, and generate a remediation plan. Confirmed PII findings are tagged with classification labels, a remediation ticket is created for the data owner, and the compliance team is notified. Designed for data governance and compliance teams.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create remediation tickets for data owners to address PII findings

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify compliance team and data owners of PII discovery findings

data.title: PII Discovery Alert
data.summary: Triggers on DLP scan results indicating PII found in unauthorized locations

data.title: AI PII Classification Analysis
data.summary: Riggs AI classifies PII types, assesses exposure risk, and generates remediation plan

config.custom_instructions: Classify all PII types found (SSN, credit card, email, phone, health records, financial data). Assess storage compliance against GDPR/CCPA requirements. Rate exposure risk and recommend specific remediation steps.

data.title: PII Requires Remediation?
data.summary: Branch based on whether discovered PII needs remediation action

data.title: Apply Classification Tags
data.summary: Tag the discovered data with appropriate classification labels

config.note: Classification tags applied based on Riggs AI PII analysis

data.title: Create Remediation Ticket
data.summary: Create a Jira ticket for the data owner with remediation plan

config.title: PII Remediation Required: {{$.trigger.alert.resource_name}} — {{$.nodes.pii-2.result.pii_types}}

data.title: Notify Compliance Team
data.summary: Alert the compliance team about PII discovery requiring remediation

data.title: Close Alert — Compliant
data.summary: Data is properly classified and stored, no remediation needed

config.note: PII discovery alert reviewed by Riggs AI. Data is properly classified, stored in approved locations, and compliant with data protection policies. No remediation required. Closing alert.

data.title: Playbook Complete
data.summary: PII discovery and classification workflow finished

config.summary: PII discovery and classification scan completed
